code:
%%{IoT_Industrial_TelemetryStream}}}%%
sequenceDiagram
    participant User as User
    participant RegistrationForm as Registration Form
    participant FortifyController as Fortify Controller
    participant UserRepository as User Repository
    participant EmailVerification as Email Verification
    participant Database as Database

    User->>RegistrationForm: Fill registration form
    RegistrationForm->>FortifyController: Submit registration data
    FortifyController->>FortifyController: Validate input
    FortifyController->>UserRepository: Create user
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate snowflake ID
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Generate slug
    UserRepository->>UserRepository: Hash password
    UserRepository->>Database: Save user
    Database-->>UserRepository: Confirm save
    UserRepository-->>FortifyController: Return user
    FortifyController->>EmailVerification: Send verification email
    EmailVerification-->>User: Email with verification link
    FortifyController-->>RegistrationForm: Registration successful
    RegistrationForm-->>User: Show success message
repo_description: Free and Open Source ERP platform

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个用户注册的完整流程图。用户从填写注册表单开始，经过Fortify Controller处理，最后完成邮箱验证。这个流程涉及User、Registration Form、Fortify Controller、User Repository、Email Verification和Database这几个参与者。
明白了，这是一个工业遥测系统的用户注册流程。我先确认一下：User先填写Registration Form，然后表单把数据提交给Fortify Controller对吗？Fortify Controller内部需要做输入验证吗？
对的，Fortify Controller要自己做输入验证。验证通过后，它调用User Repository来创建用户。User Repository这边需要生成snowflake ID、生成slug、还有对密码做hash，这三步都是内部完成的，然后再把数据存到Database。
好的，我先把主干流程画出来：User填写表单→提交给Fortify Controller→内部验证→调用User Repository创建用户→Repository内部生成ID、slug、hash密码→保存到Database。Database返回确认后，Repository把用户对象返回给Controller。
接下来Fortify Controller要触发邮件验证。它调用Email Verification服务发送验证邮件，然后邮件直接发到User的邮箱里。最后Controller返回注册成功给Registration Form，表单再展示成功消息给用户。

确认一下返回消息的虚线箭头：Database到User Repository是确认保存，User Repository到Fortify Controller是返回user对象，Email Verification到User是发送带验证链接的邮件，Fortify Controller到Registration Form是注册成功，Registration Form到User是显示成功消息。这些都需要用虚线表示异步返回对吗？
没错，这些返回都是虚线。另外提交数据和创建用户的过程是实线同步调用。整个流程闭合了：用户从填写表单开始，到看到成功消息结束，中间完成了数据验证、用户创建、邮件发送。
完成。序列图已经按照IoT工业遥测流的规范绘制，所有参与者和消息流向都对应上了：六个参与者、五步实线调用、五步虚线返回，User Repository的三个内部处理步骤也都标注清楚了。
